center.name: 瓜德羅普國家公園
center.summary: 瓜德羅普國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Guadeloupe woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It has become an emblem of Guadeloupean fauna and is now commonly found in the Guadeloupe National Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It has become an emblem of Guadeloupean fauna and is now commonly found in the Guadeloupe National Park
